text.title: Frontline Validation Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the frontline-validation-protocol methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Credit approval has 3 variants → matrix demands 2 operators each → shadow + listening session per pair → workaround spreadsheet bypass surfaces in V1 → reconciled model documents the divergence with evidence; sponsor accepts, opens R&D ticket for system-2 fix.

section.title: Resulting artefact
